author_identification.canonical_name_ar: يحيى بن عبد الوهاب بن محمد ابن إسحاق بن محمد بن يحيى العبدي الأصبهاني، أبو زكريا، ابن منده
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and historian from the Mandeh family of scholars in Isfahan.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the biographical literature focusing on early Muslim figures, particularly Companions who lived long lives.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Provides valuable biographical details about Companions of the Prophet Muhammad who lived to 120 years or more.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: مجدي السيد ابراهيم is a known editor of Islamic texts but specific reputation details are not available here.
